title: Savory Crunchy Mediterranean Chestnut Mushroom Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free-friendly savory and crunchy midnight-craving dish featuring chestnut mushrooms in a mediterranean flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Olives (Kalamata or black), pitted and chopped
Minced Fresh Herbs (parsley and thyme combined)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add sliced red onion to the skillet, cook for another minute or two until softened but still crisp.
Gently add chestnut mushrooms to the skillet, reduce heat slightly to maintain a low boil. Cook until tender and browned on all sides.
Toss in finely diced sun-dried tomatoes and black olives (if using), cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Stir in paprika powder and fresh herbs, continuing to cook for another minute or so. Taste the sauce and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve immediately over gluten-free crackers or sliced baguette, garnished with extra olive pieces if desired.
